mapper.sql: 6371000 * 2 * ASIN( SQRT( POWER(SIN(RADIANS((lat - #{lat}) / 2)), 2) + COS(RADIANS(#{lat})) * COS(RADIANS(lat)) * POWER(SIN(RADIANS((lng - #{lng}) / 2)), 2) ) )

lat BETWEEN #{lat} - (#{radius} / 111320.0) AND #{lat} + (#{radius} / 111320.0) AND lng BETWEEN #{lng} - (#{radius} / (111320.0 * GREATEST(ABS(COS(RADIANS(#{lat}))), 0.000001))) AND #{lng} + (#{radius} / (111320.0 * GREATEST(ABS(COS(RADIANS(#{lat}))), 0.000001)))

MBRContains( ST_GeomFromText( CONCAT( 'POLYGON((', #{lat} - (#{radius} / 111320.0), ' ', #{lng} - (#{radius} / (111320.0 * GREATEST(ABS(COS(RADIANS(#{lat}))), 0.000001))), ',', #{lat} + (#{radius} / 111320.0), ' ', #{lng} - (#{radius} / (111320.0 * GREATEST(ABS(COS(RADIANS(#{lat}))), 0.000001))), ',', #{lat} + (#{radius} / 111320.0), ' ', #{lng} + (#{radius} / (111320.0 * GREATEST(ABS(COS(RADIANS(#{lat}))), 0.000001))), ',', #{lat} - (#{radius} / 111320.0), ' ', #{lng} + (#{radius} / (111320.0 * GREATEST(ABS(COS(RADIANS(#{lat}))), 0.000001))), ',', #{lat} - (#{radius} / 111320.0), ' ', #{lng} - (#{radius} / (111320.0 * GREATEST(ABS(COS(RADIANS(#{lat}))), 0.000001))), '))' ), 4326 ), location )
mapper.select: SELECT id, 'cctv' AS type, COALESCE(agency_name, management_no) AS name, lat, lng, COALESCE(road_address, lot_address) AS address, '공공데이터포털' AS source, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(LEFT(install_ym, 4), '-', RIGHT(install_ym, 2), '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') AS installed_at FROM ( SELECT id, management_no, agency_name, road_address, lot_address, install_ym, ST_X(location) AS lat, ST_Y(location) AS lng FROM cctv_infos WHERE location IS NOT NULL AND ) infra WHERE AND <= #{radius} ORDER BY

SELECT 2000000000000 + CRC32(sn) AS id, 'securityLight' AS type, COALESCE(fclt_gvmnfc_nm, fclt_cd, sn) AS name, lat, lng, COALESCE(road_nm_addr, addr) AS address, '생활안전정보' AS source, DATE(created_at) AS installed_at FROM ( SELECT sn, fclt_gvmnfc_nm, fclt_cd, road_nm_addr, addr, created_at, ST_X(location) AS lat, ST_Y(location) AS lng FROM security_lights WHERE location IS NOT NULL AND ) infra WHERE AND <= #{radius} ORDER BY

SELECT 3000000000000 + CRC32(sn) AS id, 'streetLight' AS type, COALESCE(fclt_gvmnfc_nm, fclt_cd, sn) AS name, lat, lng, COALESCE(road_nm_addr, addr) AS address, '생활안전정보' AS source, DATE(created_at) AS installed_at FROM ( SELECT sn, fclt_gvmnfc_nm, fclt_cd, road_nm_addr, addr, created_at, ST_X(location) AS lat, ST_Y(location) AS lng FROM street_lights WHERE location IS NOT NULL AND ) infra WHERE AND <= #{radius} ORDER BY

SELECT id, 'police' AS type, COALESCE(fclty_nm, polcsttn, police, objt_id) AS name, lat, lng, COALESCE(rn_adres, adres) AS address, '생활안전지도' AS source, DATE(created_at) AS installed_at FROM ( SELECT id, objt_id, police, polcsttn, fclty_nm, rn_adres, adres, created_at, 180.0 / PI() * (2.0 * ATAN(EXP((y / 20037508.34 * 180.0) * PI() / 180.0)) - PI() / 2.0) AS lat, x / 20037508.34 * 180.0 AS lng FROM security_facilities WHERE x IS NOT NULL AND y IS NOT NULL AND x != 0 AND y != 0 ) infra WHERE AND <= #{radius} ORDER BY
